main_objective: Unblock npm run test:smoke by resolving the local Prisma schema-engine startup blocker in the smoke bootstrap.
root_cause: Playwright webServer startup depended on npx prisma db push. Prisma 7.8.0 validate and generate pass, but db push fails in the schema engine for local SQLite URLs before the smoke server starts.
fix: Use a Playwright-only better-sqlite3 database preparation script for the isolated local smoke DB, validate the DB path as workspace-local playwright.e2e.*.db only, avoid raw DATABASE_URL logging, and disable reuseExistingServer so smoke setup always runs.

checks_run.result: failed as expected: rejected non-test parent path
passed with existing Turbopack NFT warning

remaining_blockers: Direct npx prisma db push still fails with a schema engine error and should be investigated separately.
risks: Manual SQLite schema bootstrap must stay aligned with prisma/schema.prisma.
Interrupted-run unrelated changes are still present in the worktree and should be separated before commit.
next_recommended_task: Isolate the smoke bootstrap fix into a focused diff, then investigate direct Prisma db push schema-engine failure separately.
